spec_match.rationale: Page demonstrates the headline Cookie Store API `maxAge` attribute surface (maxAge, API, HTTP); residual gaps in spec vocabulary: no obvious gaps.

interactive.rationale: Live UI is real (button, eventListener, input); controls include "30s"; "1m"; "5m" — well past the no-static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: Happy path is solid and some failure/feature-detect paths are surfaced, but the full set of edge cases (timeouts, abort, malformed input, multiple invocations) is not exercised.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5190778418757632 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: Design-system regressions: button rule overrides background without color (.preset-btn:hover).

openQuestions.title: Show the failure modes on cookie-manager
openQuestions.detail: Right now the page only demonstrates the happy path. Add at least one of: a feature-detection probe with graceful fallback, an error/throw path (empty input, invalid argument), and a boundary case (zero, max, abort).

openQuestions.title: Bring cookie-manager back onto the design system
openQuestions.detail: Design-system regressions: button rule overrides background without color (.preset-btn:hover). See CLAUDE.md rules #5, #6, #7 — CSS variables only, WCAG AA, button background+color always overridden together.

summary: cookie-manager covers the happy path of Cookie Store API `maxAge` attribute and is interactive enough to clear the bar, but spec coverage and edge cases need filling in — see open questions.
